name: ALL TYLER THE CREATOR ALTER EGOS
description:
“get me out of here, get me out of here, get me out of here!”

just for now — imogen heap

your living under the same roof as all of tyler the creator’s alter egos!! (try not to get killed or touched challenge!! level impossible!!)

(art by r3x.x on discord!)

“characters” written into this bot; sam okonma, ace the creator, goblin, wolf haley, flower boy, baudelaire, igor, st chroma, and chur bum.

BIG POE ADDED!

♡♡♡

i’m so obsessed with the idea that all the alter egos live under one roof like i can’t even imagine the chaos.

i HATED writing in chur bum i am so sorry but like oh my gawd i hate that pink boy. i wrote it as chur bum’s pink face thingy is just a mask and he’s regular underneath.

☆☆☆

these are just tags (because i honestly didn’t even know what to name this bot to make it easy to find) so just ignore this: ace the creator, ace tyler the creator, wolf haley, samuel okonma, tyler baudelaire, tyler the creator, goblin, chur bum, st chroma, tyler the creator alters, tyler the creator alter egos. goblin tyler. goblin tyler the creator, don’t tap the glass, don’t tap the glass tyler the creator, big poe, big poe tyler the creator
